properties.name: related
properties.value: {% set related = '["Film","imdb","Clippings"]' %}{% if schema:@TVSeries:name %}{% set series = "Series" %}{% set related = related|merge:series %}{% endif %}{% set related = related|wikilink|join %}{{related}}

properties.name: writers
genre
properties.value: {% set tvGenres = schema:@TVSeries:genre %}{% set movieGenres = schema:genre %}{% set chipGenres = selector:a[href*="/interest/"] span.ipc-chip__text %}{% set allGenres = tvGenres|merge:movieGenres|merge:chipGenres|unique %}{{allGenres|wikilink|join}}
